location: A 0.5% drop from cleaver-wielding Dominula Dancers in Dominula, Windmill Village on the northern Altus Plateau. Head south from the Windmill Heights grace to find a group of four dancing women, three of whom carry the cleaver.
tactics: Drop rate is very low (0.5%), so expect to fight the same group repeatedly — Silver Scarab/Golden Scarab talismans or Silver Tear Mask raise item discovery and speed up the farm
The dancers themselves are not very dangerous alone, but the wider village has other windmill enemies and the Godskin Apostle boss patrolling nearby, so clear a safe path before settling in to farm

Don't confuse it with the visually similar Iron Cleaver, which drops from Misbegotten enemies in entirely different locations — only these specific Windmill Village dancers drop the Celebrant's Cleaver
lore: A ceremonial cutting tool carved from human bone and dressed in colorful fabric, once swung by the dancers of Dominula during their rites — it still, unnervingly, drips a trickle of the runes shed by anyone it strikes.

builds.name: Quality Strength/Dex
builds.why: Even D/D scaling in Strength and Dexterity, identical in spirit to the Battle Axe, fits a balanced quality build.

builds.name: Rune-farming novelty pick
builds.why: Grants a small amount of runes on every landed hit, a minor passive that offsets rune costs while grinding weaker enemies elsewhere.
